nasb.text: In that day there will be inscribed on the bells of the horses, “HOLY TO THE Lord.” And the cooking pots in the Lord’s house will be like the bowls before the altar.

esv.text: And on that day there shall be inscribed on the bells of the horses, “Holy to the Lord.” And the pots in the house of the Lord shall be as the bowls before the altar.

cnv.text: 到那日，馬的鈴鐺上必有“歸耶和華為聖”這句話；耶和華殿裡的鍋必好像祭壇前獻祭用的碗一樣。

ccb.text: 到那天，马铃上也必刻上“献给耶和华”的字样。耶和华殿内的锅必像祭坛前的碗一样圣洁。
